docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILL, VANDOR AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, REGINA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,057.00 FILED BY HILL, VANDOR AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, REGINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED SEP-06-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, REGINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO SEP-29-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF VANDOR HILL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT REGINA SHAW. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. PERSONAL SERVICE ON DEFENDANT REGINA HALL WAS EFFECTUATED ON 9/6/16, LESS THAN THE REQUIRED FIFTEEN DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-29-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF VANDOR HILL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT REGINA SHAW. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, VANDOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, REGINA $3,057.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,147.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
